---
layout: default
title: "Monsoon Session Agenda and Judicial Interventions"
date: 2026-07-17T05:58:08.782424+00:00
summary: "Parliament prepares for a contentious Monsoon Session featuring key legislative reforms, while the Supreme Court issues rulings on prisoner rights and education"
run_time_ist: "11:28AM"
---

<article class="digest-post">
  <a class="back-link" href="{{ '/' | relative_url }}">Political Brief</a>
  <p class="post-meta">Gemini Summary: 11:28AM</p>


<h2 class="section-title">India National Politics</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Parliamentary agenda:</strong> The upcoming Monsoon Session will focus on five key bills, including reforms to FCRA, education, income tax, and MSME regulations, amid intense political debate over the potential introduction of the Delimitation Bill and One Nation, One Election (ONOE) push.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I1</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMi--?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I2</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I3</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I7</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMinwFBVV95cUxPRzZteHkyR19WcjRnd1B1T0x6UEtxbENTaTZXb3BoR09hWWFqUmxraXdpRDVPekhUel93TjNwMkVGdUUxX3dzOG4xQm9UaXA1c2RnanVUOE1UbkxhMGxpUUhEeklvb1VjVVF0UlZlQUY1YUhZQTJXVWoteW1aZGt3c2YtTVR0VmRaRmVHdFpKRklnQlZhczlJQ1ZZUjh1ZFk?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I15</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I16</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Political shifts:</strong> Trinamool Congress leader Koel Mallick has resigned from her Rajya Sabha seat and held discussions with BJP leader Bhupender Yadav.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I17</a></span></li>
</ul>

<h2 class="section-title">Policy and Institutions</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Judicial directives:</strong> The Supreme Court has directed the government to formulate a policy for the early release of terminally ill and elderly prisoners, while separately expressing concern that the introduction of a third language in schools should begin in Class 6 rather than Class 9.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W10</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMi-?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W1</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Election outcomes:</strong> In a setback for the BJP, the Supreme Court has set aside the election of a BJP MLC in Karnataka, declaring the Congress candidate the winner of the 2021 council polls.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMi-?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W1</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W10</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Economic policy:</strong> A member of the Prime Minister&#x27;s Economic Advisory Council (PMEAC) has publicly advocated for a strategic rethink regarding India&#x27;s investment policy toward China.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W10</a></span></li>
</ul>
